features.name: interface with 2D unpacked array field using parameter width
features.description: Code should include an interface containing a 2D unpacked array field where the array width is specified by a parameter

features.name: multiple interface instantiations with different parameter values
features.description: Code should include two instances of the same parameterized interface where each instance passes a different parameter value

features.name: width mismatch assignment to interface member from external signal
features.description: Code should include an assignment from a signal to an interface member where the signal width differs from the interface field width
